meaning: (新用户的)"潜伏"(在USENET上作为旁观者,不参加讨论)
examples: A crocodile was lurking just below the surface.
Why are you lurking around outside my house?
He thought he saw someone lurking above the chamber during the address.
You have a basic understanding that every day is different and change is ALWAYS lurking.
But death-penalty opponents see subtle changes in public opinion lurking beneath such data (see article).
